Day 3 · Sun Apr 19

Tijuca Forest Wildlife

A wildlife-focused rainforest day in Tijuca with birds, monkeys, waterfalls, and a guided forest outing.

Jump to gallery Read the plan
Daily plan

What happens on this day

  • 🌳 World's largest urban rainforest — 32 km²
  • 🐒 Capuchin monkeys & marmosets often trail-side
  • 🦜 189+ bird species incl. toucans & tanagers
  • 💧 Cascatinha Taunay — a hidden 35 m waterfall
  • 🦋 April = peak butterfly season in the forest
  • 🐸 Atlantic forest tree frogs after rain
  • 📋 Book: Ricardo Barbosa / Pica-pau Tours
